decisions.question: What is the verdict artifact schema, and does the review artifact persist through a loop-back (with Phase 7 gated on its verdict field) or get deleted (letting the existing resume logic re-enter at the loop target)?

How is the two-tier execution model structured: do the same four categories run in both fast-path and full adversarial mode (differing only in agent count/depth) or does the fast path skip some categories?
decisions.chosen: Same four categories in both modes; agent count and evaluation depth differ

decisions.question: How does the review agent assess AC discriminability without running the code: pattern-based heuristics, LLM adversarial reasoning, or a combination?
decisions.chosen: Combination — pattern-based heuristics for automatable patterns, LLM adversarial reasoning anchored to the taxonomy for semantic patterns

decisions.question: When the review finds AC quality failures, what is the output: flag-only, flag plus correction hint, or generate full replacement ACs?
